label: Reply.io
description: Automate multi-channel sales outreach via email, LinkedIn, calls, and SMS using Reply.io sequences.

form.title: Connect Reply.io
form.subtitle: Paste your Reply.io API key to give Anton access to your sequences, contacts, and stats.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Reply.io API key — found in Settings → API & Integrations. No OAuth setup needed; takes about 30 seconds.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Reply.io API key

1. Log in to [Reply.io](https://app.reply.io).
2. Click your avatar or workspace name in the bottom-left corner to open account settings.
3. Navigate to **Settings → API & Integrations**.
4. Under the **API** section you'll see your API key. Click **Copy** (or reveal it first if masked).
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- The API key is tied to your user account. If you are on a team plan, ensure the account has the permissions required for the actions Anton will perform (e.g. managing contacts, triggering sequences).
- Reply.io does not currently support multiple API keys or scoped tokens — the single key grants full account access, so keep it safe.
- If you regenerate your key in Reply.io settings, update it here to avoid authentication errors.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Reply.io → Settings → API & Integrations. Grants full account access — treat it like a password.
